creator: lebel@lebel.org
text:
My patch that I submitted (#22155) fix this issue and upgrade to
1.1.4.

I'm waiting for the maintainer to approve the patch.

http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=22155

Ciao,
  ...David

Quoting jason@mastaler.com (jason@mastaler.com):
> 
> >Number:         22302
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       port audio/cdrdao fails to build with "make"
> >Confidential:   no
> >Severity:       critical
> >Priority:       high
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports
> >State:          closed
> >Quarter:        
> >Keywords:       
> >Date-Required:
> >Class:          sw-bug
> >Submitter-Id:   current-users
> >Arrival-Date:   Wed Oct 25 22:20:00 PDT 2000
> >Closed-Date:
> >Last-Modified:
> >Originator:     Jason R Mastaler
> >Release:        FreeBSD 4.1-20001019-STABLE i386
> >Organization:
> >Environment:
> 
> 	
> 
> >Description:
> 
> port audio/cdrdao complains about `-lscg' and then fails.
> 
> >How-To-Repeat:
> 
> make produces the following error:
> 
> ar r libdao.a port.o CdrDriver.o CDD2600Base.o CDD2600.o PlextorReader.o GenericMMC.o SubChannel.o PQSubChannel16.o PWSubChannel96.o PQChannelEncoder.o GenericMMCraw.o PlextorReaderScan.o RicohMP6200.o TaiyoYuden.o YamahaCDR10x.o TeacCdr55.o SonyCDU920.o SonyCDU948.o CdTextEncoder.o dao.o ScsiIf-lib.o
> ranlib libdao.a
> c++  -o cdrdao main.o -L. -ldao -L../paranoia -lcdda_paranoia -L../trackdb -ltrackdb -L../edc_ecc -ledc_ecc -L../scsilib/export -lscg -lschily -lcam   
> /usr/libexec/elf/ld: cannot find -lscg
> gmake[1]: *** [cdrdao] Error 1
> gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/audio/cdrdao/work/cdrdao-1.1.3/dao'
> gmake: *** [all] Error 1
> *** Error code 2
> 
> Stop in /usr/ports/audio/cdrdao.
> *** Error code 1
> 
> Stop in /usr/ports/audio/cdrdao.
> *** Error code 1
> 
> Stop in /usr/ports/audio/cdrdao.
>  
> >Fix:
> 
> 	
> 
>
